hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then staged_files=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged_files" | grep -qE '^\.env$|\.env\.|credentials|secrets'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Sensitive file staged for commit (.env or credentials file). Run: git diff --cached --name-only"}}'; else secret_hits=$(git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep '^+' | grep -vE '^\+\+\+' | grep -iE '(token|api[_-]?key|secret|password|Bearer|DMI_TOKEN|client_secret)\s*[=:]\s*["'\''\`][A-Za-z0-9_/+\-]{8,}'); if [ -n "$secret_hits" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Potential secret detected in staged changes. Review with: git diff --cached"}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi; fi; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi
